title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at MyGlamm

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at MyGlamm
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!
